description: Legal deed: Betrothal agreement (draft), in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (fl. 1100-1138 CE), assuring the wife that she would have an apartment to herself, not to be shared with an enslaved woman (jāriya), and that he will not take a second wife (aw tazawwaja ʿalayhā. . .). No names preserved. (Information mainly from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
